وَتَرَكَ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ دَيْنًا مِنْ التَّمْرِ فَاشْتَدَّ عَلَيَّ بَعْضُ غُرَمَائِهِ فِي التَّقَاضِي فَأَتَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّ أَبِي أُصِيبَ يَوْمَ كَذَا وَكَذَا وَإِنَّهُ تَرَكَ عَلَيْهِ دَيْنًا مِنْ التَّمْرِ وَإِنَّهُ قَدْ اشْتَدَّ عَلَيَّ بَعْضُ غُرَمَائِهِ فِي الطَّلَبِ فَأُحِبُّ أَنْ تُعِينَنِي عَلَيْهِ لَعَلَّهُ أَنْ يُنْظِرَنِي طَائِفَةً مِنْ تَمْرِهِ إِلَى هَذَا الصِّرَامِ الْمُقْبِلِ قَالَ نَعَمْ آتِيكَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ قَرِيبًا مِنْ وَسَطِ النَّهَارِ قَالَ فَجَاءَ وَمَعَهُ حَوَارِيُّوهُ قَالَ فَجَلَسُوا فِي الظِّلِّ وَسَلَّمَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَاسْتَأْذَنَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ عَلَيْنَا قَالَ وَقَدْ قُلْتُ لِامْرَأَتِي إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ جَائِيَّ الْيَوْمَ وَسَطَ النَّهَارِ فَلَا يَرَيَنَّكِ وَلَا تُؤْذِي رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي شَيْءٍ وَلَا تُكَلِّمِيهِ فَفَرَشَتْ فِرَاشًا وَوِسَادَةً وَوَضَعَ رَأْسَهُ فَنَامَ فَقُلْتُ لِمَوْلًى لِي اذْبَحْ هَذِهِ الْعَنَاقَ وَهِيَ دَاجِنٌ سَمِينَةٌ فَالْوَحَى وَالْعَجَلَ افْرُغْ مِنْهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَيْقِظَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَأَنَا مَعَكَ فَلَمْ نَزَلْ فِيهَا حَتَّى فَرَغْنَا مِنْهَا وَهُوَ نَائِمٌ فَقُلْتُ إِنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حِينَ يَسْتَيْقِظُ يَدْعُو بِطَهُورِهِ وَأَنَا أَخَافُ إِذَا فَرَغَ أَنْ يَقُومَ فَلَا يَفْرُغَ مِنْ طُهُورِهِ حَتَّى يُوضَعَ الْعَنَاقُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ فَلَمَّا اسْتَيْقَظَ قَالَ يَا جَابِرُ ايْتِنِي بِطَهُورٍ قَالَ نَعَمْ فَلَمْ يَفْرُغْ مِنْ وُضُوئِهِ حَتَّى وُضِعَتْ الْعَنَاقُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ قَالَ فَنَظَرَ إِلَيَّ فَقَالَ كَأَنَّكَ قَدْ عَلِمْتَ حُبَّنَا اللَّحْمِ ادْعُ أَبَا بَكْرٍ ثُمَّ دَعَا حَوَارِيِّيهِ قَالَ فَجِيءَ بِالطَّعَامِ فَوُضِعَ قَالَ فَوَضَعَ يَدَهُ وَقَالَ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ كُلُوا فَأَكَلُوا حَتَّى شَبِعُوا وَفَضَلَ مِنْهَا لَحْمٌ كَثِيرٌ وَقَالَ وَاللَّهِ إِنَّ مَجْلِسَ بَنِي سَلَمَةَ لَيَنْظُرُونَ إِلَيْهِمْ هُوَ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْهِمْ مِنْ أَعْيُنِهِمْ مَا يَقْرَبُونَهُ مَخَافَةَ أَنْ يُؤْذُوهُ ثُمَّ قَامَ وَقَامَ أَصْحَابُهُ فَخَرَجُوا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَكَانَ يَقُولُ خَلُّوا ظَهْرِي لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ قَالَ فَاتَّبَعْتُهُمْ حَتَّى بَلَغْتُ سَقُفَّةَ الْبَابِ فَأَخْرَجَتْ امْرَأَتِي صَدْرَهَا وَكَانَتْ سَتِيرَةً فَقَالَتْ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلِّ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى زَوْجِي قَالَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْكِ وَعَلَى زَوْجِكِ ثُمَّ قَالَ ادْعُوا لِي فُلَانًا لِلْغَرِيمِ الَّذِي اشْتَدَّ عَلَيَّ فِي الطَّلَبِ فَقَالَ أَنْسِ جَابِرًا طَائِفَةً مِنْ دَيْنِكَ الَّذِي عَلَى أَبِيهِ إِلَى هَذَا الصِّرَامِ الْمُقْبِلِ قَالَ مَا أَنَا بِفَاعِلٍ قَالَ وَاعْتَلَّ وَقَالَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ مَالُ يَتَامَى فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَيْنَ جَابِرٌ قَالَ قُلْتُ أَنَا ذَا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ كِلْ لَهُ مِنْ الْعَجْوَةِ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى سَوْفَ يُوَفِّيهِ فَرَفَعَ رَأْسَهُ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ فَإِذَا الشَّمْسُ قَدْ دَلَكَتْ قَالَ الصَّلَاةُ يَا أَبَا بَكْرٍ قَالَ فَانْدَفَعُوا إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ فَقُلْتُ لِغَرِيمِي قَرِّبْ أَوْعِيَتَكَ فَكِلْتُ لَهُ مِنْ الْعَجْوَةِ فَوَفَّاهُ اللَّهُ وَفَضَلَ لَنَا مِنْ التَّمْرِ كَذَا وَكَذَا قَالَ فَجِئْتُ أَسْعَى إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي مَسْجِدِهِ كَأَنِّي شَرَارَةٌ فَوَجَدْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَدْ صَلَّى فَقُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنِّي قَدْ كِلْتُ لِغَرِيمِي تَمْرَهُ فَوَفَّاهُ اللَّهُ وَفَضَلَ لَنَا مِنْ التَّمْرِ كَذَا وَكَذَا فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَيْنَ عُمَرُ بْنُ الْخَطَّابِ قَالَ فَجَاءَ يُهَرْوِلُ قَالَ سَلْ جَابِرَ بْنَ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ غَرِيمِهِ وَتَمْرِهِ قَالَ مَا أَنَا بِسَائِلِهِ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ سَوْفَ يُوَفِّيهِ إِذْ أَخْبَرْتَ أَنَّ اللَّهَ سَوْفَ يُوَفِّيهِ فَرَدَّدَ عَلَيْهِ وَرَدَّدَ عَلَيْهِ هَذِهِ الْكَلِمَةَ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ كُلُّ ذَلِكَ يَقُولُ مَا أَنَا بِسَائِلِهِ وَكَانَ لَا يُرَاجَعُ بَعْدَ الْمَرَّةِ الثَّالِثَةِ فَقَالَ مَا فَعَلَ غَرِيمُكَ وَتَمْرُكَ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَفَّاهُ اللَّهُ وَفَضَلَ لَنَا مِنْ التَّمْرِ كَذَا وَكَذَا فَرَجَعْتُ إِلَى امْرَأَتِي فَقُلْتُ أَلَمْ أَكُنْ نَهَيْتُكِ أَنْ تُكَلِّمِي رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي بَيْتِي فَقَالَتْ تَظُنُّ أَنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى يُورِدُ نَبِيَّهُ فِي بَيْتِي ثُمَّ يَخْرُجُ وَلَا أَسْأَلُهُ الصَّلَاةَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى زَوْجِي
items.id: Has told us [Abu An Nu'man] has told us [Abu 'Awanah] from [Al Aswad] from [Nubaih Al 'Anazi] from [Jabir bin Abdullah] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam went out to fight the polytheists. My father (Abdullah) said; "Don't go to war, O Jabir, you are enough as a resident of Madinah whose job is to monitor information about the condition of the Muslim troops. So you really know what our fate is. For the sake of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, if it weren't for me leaving my daughters behind after me, I would have been very happy if you had been killed in front of me (martyred on the battlefield). Jabir said; When I was with the people whose job it was to monitor the situation and the return of the troops, suddenly my aunt came with the bodies of my father and uncle so that he could bury them both in our family cemetery. Then he met someone who shouted, "Indeed, the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam ordered you to return the people who died to the place where they were killed, and you bury them at the location where they were killed. "So we immediately returned the bodies of my father and uncle to the location where he was killed. We buried them exactly where they were massacred. Then one day, when I (Jabir) was during the caliphate of Mu'awiyah bin Abu Sufyan Radliyallahu'anhu, suddenly a messenger came to me. He said; "O Jabir bin Abdullah, indeed the builders of Mu'awiyah Radliyallahu'anhu, when dismantling the cemetery, found your father's (body) up to his body. visible. Some of the builders had left so I had the opportunity to see my father's body. Uhh... Uhh... I found my father's body still exactly the same as I buried him, unchanged except for the marks of the person who was killed. The narrator (Jabir) said; so I covered it up. I still remember that my father left a debt in the form of dates, some people who lent him forced me to (immediately) pay it. Then I met Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. And I expressed all my concerns; "O Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, in fact my father died in a war, and indeed he left a debt in the form of dates, and indeed the owners of the debts forced me to (immediately) pay off these debts. I would be very happy if the king was willing to help him, who knows, maybe he would be willing to postpone (the bill) until the next harvest season. He said: "Okay, I will give it to you, God willing, Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, not long after this afternoon. " The narrator (Jabir) said; "He then came with his loyal friends. "The narrator (Jabir) said; they waited in the shelter and Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam greeted us and asked for permission, then entered our house. The narrator (Jabir) said; "I have told my wife that Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam will visit me today after midday, so don't show yourself, don't offend Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam with anything (anything) and don't also talked to him. "Then I spread out a bed and provided a pillow, then he laid his head down and went to sleep. Then I ordered my servant; "Slaughter this female goat, it is a docile kid, has lots of meat and is agile. Please prepare it before Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam wakes up, and if he wakes up he will definitely ask for water to purify, while I feel worried if he wakes up and finishes purifying while goat meat is not yet available in front of him. " When he woke up from his sleep, he said: "O Jabir, provide me with water to purify, I answered; "Yes, okay." So before he finished his ablution, I placed (cooked) goat meat in front of him. The narrator (Jabir) said; "He looked at me then said; it seems you already know our favorite meat, call Abu Bakr Radliyallahu'anhu. Then the food was brought and served. The Perawi (Jabir) said; Then he said: Say the name of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala (Bismillah) and eat. So they ate until they were full and there was a lot of meat left (from the dish). The Perawi (Jabir) said; "By Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, verily the assembly The Bani Salamah thought to themselves that they loved the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam more than their own eyes which were very, very close to them, because they were very worried that they would hurt him. Then he got up and so did his companions, then they came out past him, and he said "Let me leave my freedom (my affairs) to the angels." The narrator (Jabir) said; Then I accompanied them back to the board near the door, then my wife showed herself a little which was previously covered by a veil and said; "O Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, pray for me and my husband." He answered; "May Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala give His blessings on you and your husband." Then he said: "Please call me so and so (addressed to the person in debt who is urging me to immediately pay it off)." Then he said: "Defer for Jabir Radliyallahu'anhu part of the debt that you owe his father until the next harvest season." He said: "I can't do that, O Messenger of Allah!" He said: "Or you reduce it" he said: "This property belongs to the orphans, O Messenger of Allah." Jabir said: "I am the Messenger of Allah." Then the Messenger said: "Weigh for him 'ajuwa dates (a type of date that grows in 'Aliyah Medina) because Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala will definitely have enough for him", then Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam raised his head upwards and it turned out that the sun had set so he said: "Let us pray, O Abu Bakr Radliyallahu'anhu", Jabir Radliyallahu'anhu said: "They all went to the mosque" then I said to the debtor: "Bring your vessel closer." Then I weighed the 'ajuwa dates for him. So Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala provided enough for us and still left some dates for us. Jabir Radliyallahu'anhu said: "So I rushed to meet Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam in this mosque, as if I were a despicable person, then I found Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam had finished praying, then I said to Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam: Indeed, I have measured the dates and Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala is sufficient, and there is left for us this much and like this." Then Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam asked: "Where is Umar bin Khaththab Radliyallahu'anhu?" The narrator (Jabir) said; Umar came running at a trot, so he ordered him, "Please ask Jabir bin Abdullah Radliyallahu'anhu about the person who owed (his father) and also his dates." Umar answered; "I don't need to ask and I feel sure that Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala will definitely provide him with sufficiency, that is, when you tell him that Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala will provide him with sufficiency." "I don't need to ask." Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam did not repeat his question again after the third time, so he asked: "How is the condition of the person who owes you and also your dates?" The narrator said; So I answered; Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala has given him enough and has left this and this many dates. Then I went home to my wife and said; "Didn't I forbid you from talking to Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam in my house?" he answered; Do you think that Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala has brought His Messenger to my house, then left without me asking him to pray for prosperity for me and my husband??

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْحَقُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي حَكِيمٍ حَدَّثَنِي الْحَكَمُ بْنُ أَبَانَ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ فَضَّلَ مُحَمَّدًا عَلَى الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَعَلَى أَهْلِ السَّمَاءِ فَقَالُوا يَا ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ بِمَ فَضَّلَهُ عَلَى أَهْلِ السَّمَاءِ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَالَ لِأَهْلِ السَّمَاءِ { وَمَنْ يَقُلْ مِنْهُمْ إِنِّي إِلَهٌ مِنْ دُونِهِ فَذَلِكَ نَجْزِيهِ جَهَنَّمَ كَذَلِكَ نَجْزِي الظَّالِمِينَ } الْآيَةَ وَقَالَ اللَّهُ لِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ { إِنَّا فَتَحْنَا لَكَ فَتْحًا مُبِينًا لِيَغْفِرَ لَكَ اللَّهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِكَ وَمَا تَأَخَّرَ } قَالُوا فَمَا فَضْلُهُ عَلَى الْأَنْبِيَاءِ قَالَ قَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ { وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ رَسُولٍ إِلَّا بِلِسَانِ قَوْمِهِ لِيُبَيِّنَ لَهُمْ } الْآيَةَ وَقَالَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لِمُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ { وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا كَافَّةً لِلنَّاسِ } فَأَرْسَلَهُ إِلَى الْجِنِّ وَالْإِنْسِ
items.id: Has told us [Ishaq bin Ibrahim] has told us [Yazid bin Abu Hakim] has told me [Al Hakam bin Abaan] from ['Ikrimah] from [Ibn Abbas] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; "Indeed, Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala gave primacy to the Prophet Muhammad sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam over other Prophets and over the inhabitants of the heavens." Then they asked: "O Ibn Abbas, what primacy was given to him over the inhabitants of the heavens?" Ibn Abbas answered; "Indeed, Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala has said to the inhabitants of the heavens: From Ibn Abbas said: WAMAN YAQUL MINHUM INNII ILAAHUN MIN DUNIHI FADZALIJKA NAJZIIHI JAHANNAMA KADZALIKA NAJZII AZHA-ZHALIMIIN And whoever among them says, verily I am a god other than Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, then we will reward that person with jahannam, with thus we give retribution to the wrongdoers. (Qs. Al Anbiya` /21: 29) And Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala for your past and future sins and completes His blessings on you and guides you to the straight path said, `We did not send any Messenger, but in the language of his people, so that he could explain clearly to them. ` (Qs. Ibraahiim /14: 4) and Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala said to the Prophet Muhammad sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, ` and We have not sent you but to all mankind as a bearer of good news and a warner. ` (Qs. As Saba ` 34: 28), then he was sent to the jinn and humans.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَجِيدِ حَدَّثَنَا زَمْعَةُ عَنْ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ جَلَسَ نَاسٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَنْتَظِرُونَهُ فَخَرَجَ حَتَّى إِذَا دَنَا مِنْهُمْ سَمِعَهُمْ يَتَذَاكَرُونَ فَتَسَمَّعَ حَدِيثَهُمْ فَإِذَا بَعْضُهُمْ يَقُولُ عَجَبًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ اتَّخَذَ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ خَلِيلًا فَإِبْرَاهِيمُ خَلِيلُهُ وَقَالَ آخَرُ مَاذَا بِأَعْجَبَ مِنْ { وَكَلَّمَ اللَّهُ مُوسَى تَكْلِيمًا } وَقَالَ آخَرُ فَعِيسَى كَلِمَةُ اللَّهِ وَرُوحُهُ وَقَالَ آخَرُ وَآدَمُ اصْطَفَاهُ اللَّهُ فَخَرَجَ عَلَيْهِمْ فَسَلَّمَ وَقَالَ قَدْ سَمِعْتُ كَلَامَكُمْ وَعَجَبَكُمْ أَنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلُ اللَّهِ وَهُوَ كَذَلِكَ وَمُوسَى نَجِيُّهُ وَهُوَ كَذَلِكَ وَعِيسَى رُوحُهُ وَكَلِمَتُهُ وَهُوَ كَذَلِكَ وَآدَمُ اصْطَفَاهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى وَهُوَ كَذَلِكَ أَلَا وَأَنَا حَبِيبُ اللَّهِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا حَامِلُ لِوَاءِ الْحَمْدِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ تَحْتَهُ آدَمُ فَمَنْ دُونَهُ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا أَوَّلُ شَافِعٍ وَأَوَّلُ مُشَفَّعٍ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا أَوَّلُ مَنْ يُحَرِّكُ بِحَلَقِ الْجَنَّةِ وَلَا فَخْرَ فَيَفْتَحُ اللَّهُ فَيُدْخِلُنِيهَا وَمَعِي فُقَرَاءُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا أَكْرَمُ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَالْآخِرِينَ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا فَخْرَ
items.id: Has told us [Ubaidullah bin Abdul Majid] has told us [Zam'ah] from [Salamah] from ['Ikrimah] from [Ibn Abbas] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; People from the companions of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam sat waiting for him. Then he came out and when he was close to them he heard them mentioning his name sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. Then he listened carefully to their conversation, then one of them said; "It is very surprising that Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala made His creatures His close friends, and Ibrahim was a close friend of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala. Others said; Which is more surprising than the verse, WA KALLAMA ALLAHU MUSA TAKLIIMAA And Allah spoke to the Prophet Musa directly (Qs. An Nisaa`/4: 164) while others said; While Jesus is the Word of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala and the Spirit Then, he came out to meet them and greeted them, then said: "I have listened to your conversation and was amazed that Abraham was a close friend of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, and indeed he was, Moses was the one he spoke to directly with Him and it was so, and Jesus was His Spirit and Word and it was so, and Adam Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala had chosen him and it was so, know that that I am Habibullah (the man who loves Allah) and there is no arrogance, I am the bearer of the banner of praise on the Day of Judgment who brought Adam and the prophets after him and there is no arrogance, and I was the first person who gave and was given intercession on the Day of Resurrection and there was no arrogance, and I was the first person to move the rope of the gate of heaven and there was no arrogance, then Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala opened the door and put me in, I entered with the poor people of the Muslims and there was no arrogance, and I am the noblest of those who came before and those who came later in the sight of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala and there is no arrogance."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ مَنْصُورِ بْنِ أَبِي الْأَسْوَدِ عَنْ لَيْثٍ عَنْ الرَّبِيعِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنَا أَوَّلُهُمْ خُرُوجًا وَأَنَا قَائِدُهُمْ إِذَا وَفَدُوا وَأَنَا خَطِيبُهُمْ إِذَا أَنْصَتُوا وَأَنَا مُسْتَشْفِعُكُمْ إِذَا حُبِسُوا وَأَنَا مُبَشِّرُهُمْ إِذَا أَيِسُوا الْكَرَامَةُ وَالْمَفَاتِيحُ يَوْمَئِذٍ بِيَدِي وَأَنَا أَكْرَمُ وَلَدِ آدَمَ عَلَى رَبِّي يَطُوفُ عَلَيَّ أَلْفُ خَادِمٍ كَأَنَّهُمْ بَيْضٌ مَكْنُونٌ أَوْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَنْثُورٌ
items.id: Has told us [Sa'id bin Sulaiman] from [Mansur bin Abi Al Aswad] from [Laits] from [Ar Rabi' bin Anas] from [Anas] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "I was the first person to rise from the grave on the day of resurrection, I was their leader when they came, I was their spokesperson when they were silent, I was the person who asked for intercession for them when they were stuck (in the mahsyar field), I was the person who gave them news when they were in despair. The glory and keys of that day are in my hands, and I am the son of Adam Alaihis the most noble greetings in beside my Lord, around me are a thousand servants, as if they were white jewels or scattered pearls."

items.arab: أخبرنا عبد الله بن عبد الحكم المصري حدثنا بكر بن مضر عن جعفر بن ربيعة عن صالح هو ابن عطاء بن خباب مولى بني الدئل عن عطاء بن أبي رباح عن جابر بن عبد الله أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال أنا قائد المرسلين ولا فخر وأنا خاتم النبيين ولا فخر وأنا أول شافع وأول مشفع ولا فخر
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Abdul Hakam Al Mishri] has told us [Bakar bin Mudlar] from [Ja'far bin Rabi'ah] from [Salih Ibn 'Atha` bin Khabbab] a former slave from the Bani Al Duil from ['Atha` bin Abi Rabbah] from [Jabir bin Abdullah] Radliyallahu'anhu That the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. said: "I am the leader of the Messengers, and there is no arrogance, I am the cover of the Prophets and there is no arrogance, I am the first person who will intercede and the first person to be interceded and there is no arrogance."

items.arab: حدثنا محمد بن عباد حدثنا سفيان هو ابن عيينة عن ابن جدعان عن أنس أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال أنا أول من يأخذ بحلقة باب الجنة فأقعقعها قال أنس كأني أنظر إلى يد رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم يحركها وصف لنا سفيان كذا وجمع أبو عبد الله أصابعه وحركها قال وقال له ثابت مسست يد رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم بيدك قال نعم قال فأعطنيها أقبلها
items.id: It has been told to us [Muhammad bin 'Abbad] has told us [Sufyan Ibn 'Uyainah] from [Ibn Jud'aan] from [Anas] that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: From Jabir bin Abdillah that the prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: I was the first to hold the rope of the gate of heaven and I moved it. Anas said; It was as if I saw the hand of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam moving it, and Sufyan mentioned (the story) likewise, and Abu Abdullah grasped his hand and moved it, the narrator said; Thabit asked him; Do you hold the hand of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam with your hand? He answered; He even gave me his hand to kiss.

items.arab: أخبرنا أحمد بن عبد الله حدثنا حسين بن علي عن زائدة عن المختار بن فلفل عن أنس قال قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم أنا أول شافع في الجنة
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Abdullah] has told us [Husain bin Ali] from [Zaidah] from [Al Mukhtar bin Fulful] from [Anas] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "I am the first person in heaven to intercede."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ حَدَّثَنِي يَزِيدُ هُوَ ابْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْهَادِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ أَبِي عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِنِّي لَأَوَّلُ النَّاسِ تَنْشَقُّ الْأَرْضُ عَنْ جُمْجُمَتِي يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأُعْطَى لِوَاءَ الْحَمْدِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا سَيِّدُ النَّاسِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَأَنَا أَوَّلُ مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَلَا فَخْرَ وَآتِي بَابَ الْجَنَّةِ فَآخُذُ بِحَلْقَتِهَا فَيَقُولُونَ مَنْ هَذَا فَأَقُولُ أَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ فَيَفْتَحُونَ لِي فَأَدْخُلُ فَأَجِدُ الْجَبَّارَ مُسْتَقْبِلِي فَأَسْجُدُ لَهُ فَيَقُولُ ارْفَعْ رَأْسَكَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ وَتَكَلَّمْ يُسْمَعْ مِنْكَ وَقُلْ يُقْبَلْ مِنْكَ وَاشْفَعْ تُشَفَّعْ فَأَرْفَعُ رَأْسِي فَأَقُولُ أُمَّتِي أُمَّتِي يَا رَبِّ فَيَقُولُ اذْهَبْ إِلَى أُمَّتِكَ فَمَنْ وَجَدْتَ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِنْ شَعِيرٍ مِنْ الْإِيمَانِ فَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ فَأَذْهَبُ فَمَنْ وَجَدْتُ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِثْقَالَ ذَلِكَ أَدْخَلْتُهُمْ الْجَنَّةَ فَأَجِدُ الْجَبَّارَ مُسْتَقْبِلِي فَأَسْجُدُ لَهُ فَيَقُولُ ارْفَعْ رَأْسَكَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ وَتَكَلَّمْ يُسْمَعْ مِنْكَ وَقُلْ يُقْبَلْ مِنْكَ وَاشْفَعْ تُشَفَّعْ فَأَرْفَعُ رَأْسِي فَأَقُولُ أُمَّتِي أُمَّتِي يَا رَبِّ فَيَقُولُ اذْهَبْ إِلَى أُمَّتِكَ فَمَنْ وَجَدْتَ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِثْقَالَ حَبَّةٍ مِنْ خَرْدَلٍ مِنْ الْإِيمَانِ فَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ فَأَذْهَبُ فَمَنْ وَجَدْتُ فِي قَلْبِهِ مِثْقَالَ ذَلِكَ أَدْخَلْتُهُمْ الْجَنَّةَ وَفُرِغَ مِنْ حِسَابِ النَّاسِ وَأُدْخِلَ مَنْ بَقِيَ مِنْ أُمَّتِي فِي النَّارِ مَعَ أَهْلِ النَّارِ فَيَقُولُ أَهْلُ النَّارِ مَا أَغْنَى عَنْكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ كُنْتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ اللَّهَ وَلَا تُشْرِكُونَ بِهِ شَيْئًا فَيَقُولُ الْجَبَّارُ فَبِعِزَّتِي لَأَعْتِقَنَّهُمْ مِنْ النَّارِ فَيُرْسِلُ إِلَيْهِمْ فَيَخْرُجُونَ مِنْ النَّارِ وَقَدْ امْتُحِشُوا فَيُدْخَلُونَ فِي نَهَرِ الْحَيَاةِ فَيَنْبُتُونَ فِيهِ كَمَا تَنْبُتُ الْحِبَّةُ فِي غُثَاءِ السَّيْلِ وَيُكْتَبُ بَيْنَ أَعْيُنِهِمْ هَؤُلَاءِ عُتَقَاءُ اللَّهِ فَيُذْهَبُ بِهِمْ فَيَدْخُلُونَ الْجَنَّةَ فَيَقُولُ لَهُمْ أَهْلُ الْجَنَّةِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْجَهَنَّمِيُّونَ فَيَقُولُ الْجَبَّارُ بَلْ هَؤُلَاءِ عُتَقَاءُ الْجَبَّارِ
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Salih] has told us [Al Laits] has told me [Yazid Ibnu Abdullah bin Al Had] from [`Amr bin Abu `Amr] from [Anas bin Malik] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; I heard the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam: "Indeed, I am the first person whose earth will split because of my glory on the Day of Judgment (later) and there is no arrogance, I am the first person to enter heaven on the Day of Resurrection and there is no arrogance, and I approached the gate of heaven and held the rope, they (guardians of heaven) asked who is this person? I answered: I am Muhammad then they opened it for me, then I entered and I found the Almighty in front of me so I prostrated to Him. Then He said: Raise your head, O Muhammad, and speak and your words will be heard, ask and your request will be granted, intercede and you will be able to intercede. So I raised my head and said: My people, my people, O my Lord. He said: "Go to your people and whoever you find in his heart is as big as a grain of wheat. heaven. Then I went and whoever I met had a heart the size of a seed, I put them into heaven. Then I found the Almighty before me, so I bowed down to Him. He said: Raise your head and speak and your words will be heard and say them and they will be heard and intercede and you will be able to intercede. So I raised my head and I said to my people, O Lord, then He said, 'Go to your people, whoever you find in their hearts of faith the size of a grain of wheat, then let them go to heaven, then I went and whoever I found in their hearts of faith the size of a grain, I put them in heaven. 'After the counting of the deeds of all mankind was finished, and the remaining of my people were thrown into hell with the inhabitants of hell, the inhabitants of hell said; It is of no use to you that you used to worship Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala and you did not associate anything with Him. So the Almighty said: By My majesty, I will free them from the fire of hell. Then it was sent to them and they were brought out of hell roasted, then they were put into the river of life, then they grew as a seed grows in flowing foam, and it was written on their foreheads; they are people who were freed by Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala. Then they were led and put into heaven. So the inhabitants of heaven said to them; "These are the inhabitants of hell." So the Almighty said: "Oh no, they are people who were freed by the Almighty."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي مُعَاوِيَةُ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ عَنْ أَبِي إِدْرِيسَ الْخَوْلَانِيِّ عَنْ ابْنِ غَنْمٍ قَالَ نَزَلَ جِبْرِيلُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَشَقَّ بَطْنَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ جِبْرِيلُ قَلْبٌ وَكِيعٌ فِيهِ أُذُنَانِ سَمِيعَتَانِ وَعَيْنَانِ بَصِيرَتَانِ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ الْمُقَفِّي الْحَاشِرُ خُلُقُكَ قَيِّمٌ وَلِسَانُكَ صَادِقٌ وَنَفْسُكَ مُطْمَئِنَّةٌ قَالَ أَبُو مُحَمَّد وَكِيعٌ يَعْنِي شَدِيدًا
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Salih] has told me [Mu`awiyah] from [Yunus bin Maisarah] from [Abu Idris Al Khaulani] from [Ibn Ghanm] he said; Jibril Alaihis greetings came down to the Messenger of Allah and cut open his stomach, then Jibril said 'A strong heart contains two ears that can hear and two eyes that can see, Muhammad sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. Rasulullah Al Muqaffa (the glorified one) and Al Hasyir (the one who collects), your morals are noble, your tongue is trustworthy and your soul is calm. Abu Muhammad said the meaning of the word waki' is the strong.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي مُعَاوِيَةُ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ رُوَيْمٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ قَيْسٍ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَدْرَكَ بِيَ الْأَجَلَ الْمَرْحُومَ وَاخْتَصَرَ لِيَ اخْتِصَارًا فَنَحْنُ الْآخِرُونَ وَنَحْنُ السَّابِقُونَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَإِنِّي قَائِلٌ قَوْلًا غَيْرَ فَخْرٍ إِبْرَاهِيمُ خَلِيلُ اللَّهِ وَمُوسَى صَفِيُّ اللَّهِ وَأَنَا حَبِيبُ اللَّهِ وَمَعِي لِوَاءُ الْحَمْدِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَعَدَنِي فِي أُمَّتِي وَأَجَارَهُمْ مِنْ ثَلَاثٍ لَا يَعُمُّهُمْ بِسَنَةٍ وَلَا يَسْتَأْصِلُهُمْ عَدُوٌّ وَلَا يَجْمَعُهُمْ عَلَى ضَلَالَةٍ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Abdullah bin Salih] has told me [Mu`awiyah] from ['Urwah bin Ruwaim] from [Amr bin Qais], Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala has informed me of the death of the merciful and He shortened my life." So we are the last people but we are the predecessors on the day of judgment. I will state a statement and sorry, this is no arrogance, Ibrahim is a close friend of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala (khalilullah), Musa is the choice of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala and I am the lover of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala and with me the flag of praise on the Day of Judgment. Indeed, Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala has promised my people and protected them from three things; there will not be a terrible famine brought upon them, they will not be scattered by the enemy and they will not be gathered together in error.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ يَحْيَى حَدَّثَنَا أَرْطَاةُ بْنُ الْمُنْذِرِ عَنْ ضَمْرَةَ بْنِ حَبِيبٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مَسْلَمَةَ السَّكُونِيَّ وَقَالَ غَيْرُ مُحَمَّدٍ سَلَمَةَ السَّكُونِيَّ قَالَ بَيْنَمَا نَحْنُ عِنْدَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِذْ قَالَ قَائِلٌ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ هَلْ أُتِيتَ بِطَعَامٍ مِنْ السَّمَاءِ قَالَ نَعَمْ أُتِيتُ بِطَعَامٍ قَالَ يَا نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ هَلْ كَانَ فِيهِ مِنْ فَضْلٍ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ فَمَا فُعِلَ بِهِ قَالِ رُفِعَ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ وَقَدْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنِّي غَيْرُ لَابِثٍ فِيكُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا ثُمَّ تَلْبَثُونَ حَتَّى تَقُولُوا مَتَى مَتَى ثُمَّ تَأْتُونِي أَفْنَادًا يُفْنِي بَعْضُكُمْ بَعْضًا بَيْنَ يَدَيْ السَّاعَةِ مُوتَانٌ شَدِيدٌ وَبَعْدَهُ سَنَوَاتُ الزَّلَازِلِ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Al Mubarak] has told us [Mu'awiyah bin Yahya] has told us [Arthah bin Al Mundzir] from [Dlamrah bin Habib] he said I heard Maslamah As Sakuni -according to what other than Muhammad said- [Salamah As Sakuni] he said; When we were with Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, suddenly someone said; "O Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, were you given food from the sky? He answered: Yes, I was given food. He asked again; "O Prophet of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, is there still food left?" He answered: "Yes. " He asked again, what was done to him? He answered: "It has been lifted back into heaven, and it has been revealed to me that I will not live with you any longer, then you will continue to live until you say; "When, when? Then you came to me in groups that destroyed each other, before the end of the world there would be terrible deaths, and after that came years full of earthquakes.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ التَّيْمِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ سَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدُبٍ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أُتِيَ بِقَصْعَةٍ مِنْ ثَرِيدٍ فَوُضِعَتْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْ الْقَوْمِ فَتَعَاقَبُوهَا إِلَى الظُّهْرِ مِنْ غُدْوَةٍ يَقُومُ قَوْمٌ وَيَجْلِسُ آخَرُونَ فَقَالَ رَجُلٌ لِسَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدُبٍ أَمَا كَانَتْ تُمَدُّ فَقَالَ سَمُرَةُ مِنْ أَيِّ شَيْءٍ تَعْجَبُ مَا كَانَتْ تُمَدُّ إِلَّا مِنْ هَا هُنَا وَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى السَّمَاءِ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Uthman bin Muhammad] has told us [Yazid bin Harun] has informed us [Sulaiman At Taimi] from [Abu Al 'Ala`] from [Samurah bin Jundud] that the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam was given a large bowl containing meat porridge, then the bowl was placed in the middle of the people, then they took turns to perform the midday prayer because it was lunch, some people stood, some sat. And someone said to Samurah bin Jundab; does this food just come out of nowhere? Samurah answered; "By what are you amazed? The bowl of food was not brought except from there, as he gestured with his hand towards the sky."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَشْعَثَ بْنِ سَوَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَقَ عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ سَمُرَةَ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي لَيْلَةٍ إِضْحِيَانَ وَعَلَيْهِ حُلَّةٌ حَمْرَاءُ فَجَعَلْتُ أَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِ وَإِلَى الْقَمَرِ قَالَ فَلَهُوَ كَانَ أَحْسَنَ فِي عَيْنِي مِنْ الْقَمَرِ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Sa'id] has told us [Abdur Rahman bin Muhammad] from [Ash 'ats bin Shawwar] from [Abu Ishaq] from [Jabir bin Samurah] he said; I saw Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam on the night of the full moon and he was wearing red clothes, then I (alternately) looked at him and looked at the moon.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْمُنْذِرِ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ أَبِي ثَابِتٍ الزُّهْرِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي إِسْمَعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ابْنُ أَخِي مُوسَى عَنْ عَمِّهِ مُوسَى بْنِ عُقْبَةَ عَنْ كُرَيْبٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَفْلَجَ الثَّنِيَّتَيْنِ إِذَا تَكَلَّمَ رُئِيَ كَالنُّورِ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَيْنِ ثَنَايَاهُ
items.id: Has told us [Ibrahim bin Al Mundzir] has told us [Abdul Aziz bin Abu Thabit Az Zuhri] has told me [Ismail bin Ibrahim] - my brother's son, Musa - from his Uncle [Musa bin 'Uqbah] from [Kuraib] from [Ibn Abbas] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam had loose incisors, when he spoke it looked like there was light emitting from between his two incisors.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلَانَ حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَخْبَرَنَا مِسْعَرٌ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ عُمَرَ مَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا أَنْجَدَ وَلَا أَجْوَدَ وَلَا أَشْجَعَ وَلَا أَضْوَأَ وَأَوْضَأَ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Mahmud bin Ghailan] has told us [Yazid bin Harun] has told us [Mis'ar] from [Abdul Malik bin 'Umair] he said; [Ibn Umar] said; I have never seen someone who was quicker to fight, cleaner, braver, and brighter than Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْمُنْذِرِ الْحِزَامِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا أُسَامَةُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمَّارِ بْنِ يَاسِرٍ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِلرُّبَيِّعِ بِنْتِ مُعَوِّذِ بْنِ عَفْرَاءَ صِفِي لَنَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَتْ يَا بُنَيَّ لَوْ رَأَيْتَهُ رَأَيْتَ الشَّمْسَ طَالِعَةً
items.id: Has told us [Ibrahim bin Al Mundzir Al Hizami] has told us [Ubaidullah bin Musa] has told us [Usamah bin Zaid] from [Abu 'Ubaidah bin Muhammad bin 'Ammar bin Yasir] he said; I said to [Ar Rubai' bint Mu'awwidz bin 'Afra`]; Please, describe to me, (how) Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then he said; O my child, if you saw him, it would be as if you saw the sun rising.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا حَجَّاجُ بْنُ مِنْهَالٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ أَخْبَرَنَا ثَابِتٌ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَزْهَرَ اللَّوْنِ كَأَنَّ عَرَقَهُ اللُّؤْلُؤُ إِذَا مَشَى تَكَفَّأَ وَمَا مَسِسْتُ حَرِيرَةً وَلَا دِيبَاجَةً أَلْيَنَ مِنْ كَفِّهِ وَلَا شَمِمْتُ رَائِحَةً قَطُّ أَطْيَبُ مِنْ رَائِحَتِهِ مِسْكَةً وَلَا غَيْرَهَا
items.id: Has told us [Hajjaj bin Minhal] has told us [Hammad bin Salamah] has told us [Thabit] from [Anas] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam was a man with fair skin as if his sweat were jewels, when he walked upright, and I never touched silk or wool that was finer than the palm of his hand, and I never once smelled the fragrance of misk or anything else that was more fragrant than his fragrance.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ أَخْبَرَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ قَالَ خَدَمْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَمَا قَالَ لِي أُفٍّ قَطُّ وَلَا قَالَ لِي لِشَيْءٍ صَنَعْتُهُ لِمَ صَنَعْتَ كَذَا وَكَذَا أَوْ هَلَّا صَنَعْتَ كَذَا وَكَذَا وَقَالَ لَا وَاللَّهِ مَا مَسِسْتُ بِيَدِي دِيبَاجًا وَلَا حَرِيرًا أَلْيَنَ مِنْ يَدِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَلَا وَجَدْتُ رِيحًا قَطُّ أَوْ عَرْفًا كَانَ أَطْيَبَ مِنْ عَرْفِ أَوْ رِيحِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Nu'man] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Thabit] from [Anas bin Malik] Radliyallahu'anhu he told; In the past, I helped Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and he never said: "Ah (bass, huss, and similar shouts) to me, or he said about anything I did: "Why do you do this and this?", or "You have to do this and this?" And Anas said; No, I have never touched woolen silk cloth which is finer than the hands of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, and I have never smelled perfume and sweat. more fragrant than sweat or the fragrance of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ الرِّفَاعِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ خُدْرَةَ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي رَجُلٌ مِنْ بَنِي حُرَيْشٍ قَالَ كُنْتُ مَعَ أَبِي حِينَ رَجَمَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَاعِزَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ فَلَمَّا أَخَذَتْهُ الْحِجَارَةُ أُرْعِبْتُ فَضَمَّنِي إِلَيْهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَسَالَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ عَرَقِ إِبْطِهِ مِثْلُ رِيحِ الْمِسْكِ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Yazid Ar Rifa'i] has told us [Abu Bakr] from [Habib bin Khadrah] has told me [someone from Bani Huraisy] he said; Previously, I was with my father when Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam stoned Ma'iz bin Malik, when the rocks hit him, I trembled then Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam hugged me, then sweat dripped from his armpits which smelled like (perfume) misk.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَقَ عَنْ الْبَرَاءِ قَالَ سَأَلَهُ رَجُلٌ قَالَ أَرَأَيْتَ كَانَ وَجْهُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِثْلَ السَّيْفِ قَالَ لَا مِثْلَ الْقَمَرِ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Nu'aim] has told us [Zuhair] from [Abu Ishaq] from [Barra`] he said; someone asked him; Did you see the face of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam like a sword? He answered; "No, his face is like the moon."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ أَخْبَرَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِيمَ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يُعْرَفُ بِاللَّيْلِ بِرِيحِ الطِّيبِ
items.id: Has preached to us [Yazid bin Harun] has preached to us [Sharia] from [Al A'masy] from [Ibrahim] he said; "The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam was recognized at night by his fragrance."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مَالِكُ بْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَقُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْهَاشِمِيُّ أَخْبَرَنَا الْمُغِيرَةُ بْنُ عَطِيَّةَ عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَمْ يَسْلُكْ طَرِيقًا أَوْ لَا يَسْلُكُ طَرِيقًا فَيَتْبَعُهُ أَحَدٌ إِلَّا عَرَفَ أَنَّهُ قَدْ سَلَكَهُ مِنْ طِيبِ عَرْفِهِ أَوْ قَالَ مِنْ رِيحِ عَرَقِهِ
items.id: Has told us [Malik bin Isma'il] has told us [Ishaq bin Al Fadl bin AbdurRahman Al Hasyimi] has told us [Al Mughirah bin 'Athiyah] from [Abu Zubair] from [Jabir] that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam did not pass a single road or he passed a road but it was known that he (had just) passed that road by the smell of his sweat or he said; from his fragrant sweat.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ عَوْنٍ أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَمْرٍو اللَّيْثِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَأْكُلُ الْهَدِيَّةَ وَلَا يَقْبَلُ الصَّدَقَةَ فَأَهْدَتْ لَهُ امْرَأَةٌ مِنْ يَهُودِ خَيْبَرَ شَاةً مَصْلِيَّةً فَتَنَاوَلَ مِنْهَا وَتَنَاوَلَ مِنْهَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْبَرَاءِ ثُمَّ رَفَعَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَدَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ هَذِهِ تُخْبِرُنِي أَنَّهَا مَسْمُومَةٌ فَمَاتَ بِشْرُ بْنُ الْبَرَاءِ فَأَرْسَلَ إِلَيْهَا النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَا حَمَلَكِ عَلَى مَا صَنَعْتِ فَقَالَتْ إِنْ كُنْتَ نَبِيًّا لَمْ يَضُرَّكَ شَيْءٌ وَإِنْ كُنْتَ مَلِكًا أَرَحْتُ النَّاسَ مِنْكَ فَقَالَ فِي مَرَضِهِ مَا زِلْتُ مِنْ الْأَكْلَةِ الَّتِي أَكَلْتُ بِخَيْبَرَ فَهَذَا أَوَانُ انْقِطَاعِ أَبْهَرِي
items.id: Has informed us [Ja'far bin 'Aun] has informed us [Muhammad bin 'Amr Al Laitsi] from [Abu Salamah] he said; In the past, Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam was willing to eat (accept) gifts and did not want to accept alms, so a Khaibar Jewish woman presented him shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam with a roasted goat and he ate it as did Bisyr bin Barra`, then the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam raised his hand and said: Verily, this goat told me that it had been (smeared with) poison. So Bisyr bin Al Barra` died, so the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam sent someone to arrest him, and he asked: What caused you to do this heinous act? The woman answered; "If you were truly a prophet, no one would be able to harm you. On the other hand, if you were a king, I would have freed people from you." He said when he was sick: I still feel the effects of the food I ate when I was in Khaibar, and this is when my spine was severed.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَكَمُ بْنُ نَافِعٍ أَخْبَرَنَا شُعَيْبُ بْنُ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ كَانَ جَابِرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ يُحَدِّثُ أَنَّ يَهُودِيَّةً مِنْ أَهْلِ خَيْبَرَ سَمَّتْ شَاةً مَصْلِيَّةً ثُمَّ أَهْدَتْهَا لِلنَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَخَذَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مِنْهَا الذِّرَاعَ فَأَكَلَ مِنْهَا وَأَكَلَ الرَّهْطُ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ مَعَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُمْ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ارْفَعُوا أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْسَلَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِلَى الْيَهُودِيَّةِ فَدَعَاهَا فَقَالَ لَهَا أَسَمَمْتِ هَذِهِ الشَّاةَ فَقَالَتْ نَعَمْ وَمَنْ أَخْبَرَكَ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَخْبَرَتْنِي هَذِهِ فِي يَدِيَ الذِّرَاعُ قَالَتْ نَعَمْ قَالَ فَمَاذَا أَرَدْتِ إِلَى ذَلِكَ قَالَتْ قُلْتُ إِنْ كَانَ نَبِيًّا لَمْ يَضُرَّهُ وَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ نَبِيًّا اسْتَرَحْنَا مِنْهُ فَعَفَا عَنْهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَلَمْ يُعَاقِبْهَا وَتُوُفِّيَ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِهِ الَّذِينَ أَكَلُوا مِنْ الشَّاةِ وَاحْتَجَمَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَلَى كَاهِلِهِ مِنْ أَجْلِ الَّذِي أَكَلَ مِنْ الشَّاةِ حَجَمَهُ أَبُو هِنْدٍ مَوْلَى بَنِي بَيَاضَةَ بِالْقَرْنِ وَالشَّفْرَةِ وَهُوَ مِنْ بَنِي ثُمَامَةَ وَهُمْ حَيٌّ مِنْ الْأَنْصَارِ
items.id: Has informed us [Al Hakam bin Nafi'] has informed us [Syu'aib bin Abu Hamzah] from [Az Zuhri] he said; [Jabir bin Abdullah] Radliyallahu'anhu narrated; A Jewish woman from Khaibar put poison on roast goat meat and presented it to the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. The Prophet took the meat from his ulna and ate it, and some of his companions also ate with him. The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam immediately said to them: "Raise your hands." Then he sent someone to catch the Jewish woman and interrogate her: "Did you smear the goat with poison?" He answered; "Yes, that's right." The woman asked; "Who could have told you?" The Prophet answered: "The one who told me is what is in my hand," - meaning the scapula - The woman said, "That's right, I did put poison," she asked, "What do you mean by doing that?" he answered, "I just want to prove that if a Prophet certainly does not harm him and if not, we are free from him." So the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam forgave him by not punishing him, while some of the other companions who ate the goat's meat died. The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam cupped his upper back to remove the poison he had eaten from the goat's meat. He was cupped by Abu Hind, the maula of the Bani Bayadhah, with horns and machetes, he was from the Bani Tsumamah, which is part of the Ansar. "

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ حَدَّثَنِي سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ لَمَّا فَتَحْنَا خَيْبَرَ أُهْدِيَتْ لِرَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ شَاةٌ فِيهَا سُمٌّ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ اجْمَعُوا لِي مَنْ كَانَ هَا هُنَا مِنْ الْيَهُودِ فَجُمِعُوا لَهُ فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنِّي سَائِلُكُمْ عَنْ شَيْءٍ فَهَلْ أَنْتُمْ صَادِقِيَّ عَنْهُ قَالُوا نَعَمْ يَا أَبَا الْقَاسِمِ فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَنْ أَبُوكُمْ قَالُوا أَبُونَا فُلَانٌ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كَذَبْتُمْ بَلْ أَبُوكُمْ فُلَانٌ قَالُوا صَدَقْتَ وَبَرَرْتَ فَقَالَ لَهُمْ هَلْ أَنْتُمْ صَادِقِيَّ عَنْ شَيْءٍ إِنْ سَأَلْتُكُمْ عَنْهُ فَقَالُوا نَعَمْ وَإِنْ كَذَبْنَاكَ عَرَفْتَ كَذِبَنَا كَمَا عَرَفْتَ فِي آبَائِنَا فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَمَنْ أَهْلُ النَّارِ فَقَالُوا نَكُونُ فِيهَا يَسِيرًا ثُمَّ تَخْلُفُونَا فِيهَا قَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ اخْسَئُوا فِيهَا وَاللَّهِ لَا نَخْلُفُكُمْ فِيهَا أَبَدًا ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَلْ أَنْتُمْ صَادِقِيَّ عَنْ شَيْءٍ إِنْ سَأَلْتُكُمْ عَنْهُ قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ هَلْ جَعَلْتُمْ فِي هَذِهِ الشَّاةِ سُمًّا قَالُوا نَعَمْ قَالَ مَا حَمَلَكُمْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ قَالُوا أَرَدْنَا إِنْ كُنْتَ كَاذِبًا أَنْ نَسْتَرِيحَ مِنْكَ وَإِنْ كُنْتَ نَبِيًّا لَمْ يَضُرَّكَ
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Salih] has told me [Al Laits] has told me [Sa'id bin Abu Sa'id Al Maqburi] from [Abu Hurairah] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; "When we conquered Khaibar, Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam was given a poisoned goat as a gift. Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam immediately said: 'Please gather the Jews who are here.' Muhammad shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam). ' Lalu Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam bertanya: 'Siapakah ayah kalian? ' Mereka menjawab; 'Ayah kami si fulan. ' Kemudian Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam berkata: 'Kalian bohong!, tetapi ayah kalian adalah si fulan. ' Mereka menjawab; 'Baginda benar. ' Lalu beliau berkata kepada mereka: 'Apakah kalian akan jujur jika saya tanya tentang sesuatu? ' Mereka menjawab; 'Ya, dan jika kami lie surely you know, as you know our fathers. ' Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam asked them: 'Who are the inhabitants of hell? ' They answered; 'We were in it for a while and then you replaced us in it.' Wasallam asked them: Will you tell the truth to the question I am going to ask you?, they answered; Yes. He said: Did you put poison on the goat's (meat)? They answered: Yes, what caused you to do that?

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ عَنْ سُفْيَانَ عَنْ ابْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَ مَا سُئِلَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ شَيْئًا قَطُّ فَقَالَ لَا قَالَ أَبُو مُحَمَّد قَالَ ابْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ إِذَا لَمْ يَكُنْ عِنْدَهُ وَعَدَ
items.id: Having reported to us [Muhammad bin Yusuf] from [Sufyan] from [Ibnu Al Munkadir] from [Jabir] he said; The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam was never asked for something and then answered no. Abu Muhammad said; Ibn 'Uyainah said; If he does not have the request, surely he shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam will promise.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عِمْرَانَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ عَنْ زَمْعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي حَازِمٍ عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ قَالَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حَيِيًّا لَا يُسْأَلُ شَيْئًا إِلَّا أَعْطَاهُ
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Imran] has told us [Abu Daud Al Thayalitsi] from [Zam'ah] from [Abu Hazim] from [Sahl bin Sa'ad] Radliyallahu'anhu he said; Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam was a shy man, and he was not asked for anything but would give it.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْم��دَ بْنِ أَبِي خَلَفٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنْ الْعَرَبِ قَالَ زَحَمْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَوْمَ حُنَيْنٍ وَفِي رِجْلِي نَعْلٌ كَثِيفَةٌ فَوَطِئْتُ بِهَا عَلَى رِجْلِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَنَفَحَنِي نَفْحَةً بِسَوْطٍ فِي يَدِهِ وَقَالَ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوْجَعْتَنِي قَالَ فَبِتُّ لِنَفْسِي لَائِمًا أَقُولُ أَوْجَعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ فَبِتُّ بِلَيْلَةٍ كَمَا يَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ فَلَمَّا أَصْبَحْنَا إِذَا رَجُلٌ يَقُولُ أَيْنَ فُلَانٌ قَالَ قُلْتُ هَذَا وَاللَّهِ الَّذِي كَانَ مِنِّي بِالْأَمْسِ قَالَ فَانْطَلَقْتُ وَأَنَا مُتَخَوِّفٌ فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنَّكَ وَطِئْتَ بِنَعْلِكَ عَلَى رِجْلِي بِالْأَمْسِ فَأَوْجَعْتَنِي فَنَفَحْتُكَ نَفْحَةً بِالسَّوْطِ فَهَذِهِ ثَمَانُونَ نَعْجَةً فَخُذْهَا بِهَا
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Ahmad bin Abu Khalaf] has told us [Abdurrahman bin Muhammad] from [Muhammad bin Ishaq] has told me [Abdullah bin Abu Bakr] from [someone from Arabia] he said; I was jostling with Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam in the battle of Hunain and I wore big sandals, then I stepped on the feet of Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam. So he hit me with the whip in his hand, saying: Bismillah, you have hurt me. The narrator (Arabic man) said; in the evening I mumbled to myself; I have hurt Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. Then I spent the night at that time which only Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala knows about. In the morning, someone suddenly asked; Where is so and so? The narrator (Arabic man) said; I whispered; By Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, this is the person I had a problem with yesterday. He said; I left with fear. Then Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said to me: it was you who stepped on my feet yesterday and made me sick, then I hit you with a whip, so here are eighty ewes, please take them for you instead.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ ابْنِ أَخِي الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ إِنَّ جِبْرِيلَ قَالَ مَا فِي الْأَرْضِ أَهْلُ عَشَرَةِ أَبْيَاتٍ إِلَّا قَلَّبْتُهُمْ فَمَا وَجَدْتُ أَحَدًا أَشَدَّ إِنْفَاقًا لِهَذَا الْمَالِ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Ya'qub bin Humaid] has told us [Abdul Aziz bin Muhammad] from [Ibnu Akhi Az Zuhri] from [Az Zuhri] he said; Jibril Aalaihissalam said: There is not on this earth the owner of ten buildings except me (Aalaihissalam). I have turned them around, so I did not find anyone who gave more than Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ وَاقِدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عُقَيْلٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي أَوْفَى قَالَ كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يُكْثِرُ الذِّكْرَ وَيُقِلُّ اللَّغْوَ وَيُطِيلُ الصَّلَاةَ وَيُقْصِرُ الْخُطْبَةَ وَلَا يَأْنَفُ وَلَا يَسْتَنْكِفُ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ مَعَ الْأَرْمَلَةِ وَالْمِسْكِينِ فَيَقْضِيَ لَهُمَا حَاجَتَهُمَا
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Humaid] has told us [Al Fadl bin Musa] has told us [Al Husain bin Waqid] from [Yahya bin 'Uqail] from [Abdullah bin Abi Aufa] he said; The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam always increased his dhikr, reduced (avoided) useless things, lengthened his prayers, shortened his sermons, did not act rudely, did not feel ashamed of talking to widows and the poor to settle their affairs.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ أَخْبَرَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ قَالَ قَالَ الْعَبَّاسُ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى عَنْهُ لَأَعْلَمَنَّ مَا بَقَاءُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِينَا فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُهُمْ قَدْ آذَوْكَ وَآذَاكَ غُبَارُهُمْ فَلَوْ اتَّخَذْتَ عَرِيشًا تُكَلِّمُهُمْ مِنْهُ فَقَالَ لَا أَزَالُ بَيْنَ أَظْهُرِهِمْ يَطَئُونَ عَقِبِي وَيُنَازِعُونِي رِدَائِي حَتَّى يَكُونَ اللَّهُ هُوَ الَّذِي يُرِيحُنِي مِنْهُمْ قَالَ فَعَلِمْتُ أَنَّ بَقَاءَهُ فِينَا قَلِيلٌ
items.id: Has told us [Sulaiman bin Harb] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Ayyub] from ['Ikrimah] he said; [Abbas] Radliyallahu'anhu said; Indeed, I really know how long the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam lived with us, the narrator (Ikrimah) said; O Messenger of Allah, I see that they have hurt you and their dust has also hurt you, what if I make a shelter for you to use to talk to them? he answered: I will still be among them, even if they trample my feet and pull my shawl until Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala frees me from them. The narrator said; So we knew that he would stay with us only a short time.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا زَكَرِيَّا بْنُ عَدِيٍّ حَدَّثَنَا حَاتِمُ بْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ عَنْ أُنَيْسِ بْنِ أَبِي يَحْيَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ قَالَ خَرَجَ عَلَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي مَرَضِهِ الَّذِي مَاتَ فِيهِ وَنَحْنُ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ عَاصِبًا رَأْسَهُ بِخِرْقَةٍ حَتَّى أَهْوَى نَحْوَ الْمِنْبَرِ فَاسْتَوَى عَلَيْهِ وَاتَّبَعْنَاهُ قَالَ وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ إِنِّي لَأَنْظُرُ إِلَى الْحَوْضِ مِنْ مَقَامِي هَذَا ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ عَبْدًا عُرِضَتْ عَلَيْهِ الدُّنْيَا وَزِينَتُهَا فَاخْتَارَ الْآخِرَةَ قَالَ فَلَمْ يَفْطِنْ لَهَا أَحَدٌ غَيْرُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ فَذَرَفَتْ عَيْنَاهُ فَبَكَى ثُمَّ قَالَ بَلْ نَفْدِيكَ بِآبَائِنَا وَأُمَّهَاتِنَا وَأَنْفُسِنَا وَأَمْوَالِنَا يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ قَالَ ثُمَّ هَبَطَ فَمَا قَامَ عَلَيْهِ حَتَّى السَّاعَةِ
items.id: Has told us [Zakaria bin 'Adi] has told us [Hatim bin Ismail] from [Unais bin Abu Yahya] from [his father] from [Abu Sa'id Al Khudri] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam came out to meet us when he was sick which caused his death. We were in the mosque (Nabawi mosque) while bandaging his head with a piece of cloth, until he approached the pulpit and sat on it. We continue to follow him. Then he said: "By the One in Whose Hand my soul is, I see a lake from where I stand." ' The narrator (Abu Sa'id alkhudzri) said: At that time no one could understand what he said except Abu Bakr, so Abu Bakr's eyes filled with tears and he cried and said; In fact, we will redeem you with our fathers, our mothers, our souls and our wealth, O Messenger of Allah! '. The narrator tells the story; Then he came down from the pulpit and never stood on the pulpit until he died.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا خَلِيفَةُ بْنُ خَيَّاطٍ حَدَّثَنَا بَكْرُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ إِسْحَقَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ عَدِيٍّ عَنْ عُبَيْدٍ مَوْلَى الْحَكَمِ بْنِ أَبِي الْعَاصِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ أَبِي مُوَيْهِبَةَ مَوْلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ قَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنِّي قَدْ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَسْتَغْفِرَ لِأَهْلِ الْبَقِيعِ فَانْطَلِقْ مَعِي فَانْطَلَقْتُ مَعَهُ فِي جَوْفِ اللَّيْلِ فَلَمَّا وَقَفَ عَلَيْهِمْ قَالَ السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَهْلَ الْمَقَابِرِ لِيُهْنِكُمْ مَا أَصْبَحْتُمْ فِيهِ مِمَّا أَصْبَحَ فِيهِ النَّاسُ أَقْبَلَتْ الْفِتَنُ كَقِطْعِ اللَّيْلِ الْمُظْلِمِ يَتْبَعُ آخِرُهَا أَوَّلَهَا الْآخِرَةُ أَشَدُّ مِنْ الْأُولَى ثُمَّ أَقْبَلَ عَلَيَّ فَقَالَ يَا أَبَا مُوَيْهِبَةَ إِنِّي قَدْ أُوتِيتُ بِمَفَاتِيحِ خَزَائِنِ الدُّنْيَا وَالْخُلْدِ فِيهَا ثُمَّ الْجَنَّةُ فَخُيِّرْتُ بَيْنَ ذَلِكَ وَبَيْنَ لِقَاءِ رَبِّي قُلْتُ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي خُذْ مَفَاتِيحَ خَزَائِنِ الدُّنْيَا وَالْخُلْدَ فِيهَا ثُمَّ الْجَنَّةَ قَالَ لَا وَاللَّهِ يَا أَبَا مُوَيْهِبَةَ لَقَدْ اخْتَرْتُ لِقَاءَ رَبِّي ثُمَّ اسْتَغْفَرَ لِأَهْلِ الْبَقِيعِ ثُمَّ انْصَرَفَ فَبُدِئَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي وَجَعِهِ الَّذِي مَاتَ فِيهِ
items.id: Has told us [Khalifah bin Khayyat] has told us [Bakar bin Suilaiman] has told us [Ibn Ishaq] has told me [Abdullah bin Umar bin Ali bin 'Adi] from ['Ubaid] - former slave of Al Hakam bin Abu Al 'Ash- from [Abdullah bin 'Amr] from [Abu Muiwaihibah] - former slave of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam- he said; Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said to me 'Indeed, I have been ordered to ask forgiveness for the occupants of the Baqi cemetery', then he left with me in the middle of the night. When he was standing facing them (the cemetery) he said: ASSALAMU 'ALAIKUM YAA AHLAL MAQAABIR (may prosperity be with you, O residents of this cemetery). Hopefully your current situation is safer for you than the situation humans face now. Now slander has spread like pieces of pitch black night, the end follows the beginning. And indeed the afterlife is more difficult than the life of this world. Then he turned to face me and said: O Abu Muwaihibah, I have been given the keys to the storehouse of the world and eternity in it. Then I was given the freedom to choose between that or meeting my God. I (Abu Muwaihibah) answered; For the sake of my father and mother as a ransom, O king, just take the keys to the storehouse of worldly life and eternity in it, then heaven. He answered: 'No, by Allah, O Abu Muwaihibah, indeed I have chosen to meet my Lord. Then he asked forgiveness for the residents of Baqi and left.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحَكَمُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ إِسْحَقَ عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ عُتْبَةَ عَنْ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عُتْبَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ رَجَعَ إِلَيَّ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ مِنْ جَنَازَةٍ مِنْ الْبَقِيعِ فَوَجَدَنِي وَأَنَا أَجِدُ صُدَاعًا وَأَنَا أَقُولُ وَا رَأْسَاهُ قَالَ بَلْ أَنَا يَا عَائِشَةُ وَا رَأْسَاهُ قَالَ وَمَا ضَرَّكِ لَوْ مُتِّ قَبْلِي فَغَسَّلْتُكِ وَكَفَّنْتُكِ وَصَلَّيْتُ عَلَيْكِ وَدَفَنْتُكِ فَقُلْتُ لَكَأَنِّي بِكَ وَاللَّهِ لَوْ فَعَلْتَ ذَلِكَ لَرَجَعْتَ إِلَى بَيْتِي فَعَرَّسْتَ فِيهِ بِبَعْضِ نِسَائِكَ قَالَتْ فَتَبَسَّمَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثُمَّ بُدِئَ فِي وَجَعِهِ الَّذِي مَاتَ فِيهِ
items.id: Has told us [Al Hakam bin Mubarak] has told us [Muhammad bin Salamah] from [Ibn Ishaq] from [Ya'qub bin 'Utbah] from [Ibn Shihab] from [Ubaidullah bin Abdullah bin 'Utbah] from [Aisyah] Radliyallahu'anha he said; Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, one day came home to me from (burying) the body in Baqi'. then he found I had a headache and complained; 'Oh my head', He said: 'Oh my head, O Aisyah'. He said again: 'What would trouble you if you died before me? ' I will certainly wash you and clothe you and bury you. Then I (Aisyah Radliyallahu'anha) said; Looks like that's what you hope for, by Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, if you do that, you will definitely come home to me. Then the king had sex with some of the king's wives there. Aisyah Radliyallahu'anha said; Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam smiled then he started to get sick which caused him to die.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا فَرْوَةُ بْنُ أَبِي الْمَغْرَاءِ حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُخْتَارٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ كَعْبٍ عَنْ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي مَرَضِهِ صُبُّوا عَلَيَّ سَبْعَ قِرَبٍ مِنْ سَبْعِ آبَارٍ شَتَّى حَتَّى أَخْرُجَ إِلَى النَّاسِ فَأَعْهَدَ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَتْ فَأَقْعَدْنَاهُ فِي مِخْضَبٍ لِحَفْصَةَ فَصَبَبْنَا عَلَيْهِ الْمَاءَ صَبًّا أَوْ شَنَنَّا عَلَيْهِ شَنًّا الشَّكُّ مِنْ قِبَلِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ فَوَجَدَ رَاحَةً فَخَرَجَ فَصَعِدَ الْمِنْبَرَ فَحَمِدَ اللَّهَ وَأَثْنَى عَلَيْهِ وَاسْتَغْفَرَ لِلشُّهَدَاءِ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ أُحُدٍ وَدَعَا لَهُمْ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَّا بَعْدُ فَإِنَّ الْأَنْصَارَ عَيْبَتِي الَّتِي أَوَيْتُ إِلَيْهَا فَأَكْرِمُوا كَرِيمَهُمْ وَتَجَاوَزُوا عَنْ مُسِيئِهِمْ إِلَّا فِي حَدٍّ أَلَا إِنَّ عَبْدًا مِنْ عِبَادِ اللَّهِ قَدْ خُيِّرَ بَيْنَ الدُّنْيَا وَبَيْنَ مَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ فَاخْتَارَ مَا عِنْدَ اللَّهِ فَبَكَى أَبُو بَكْرٍ وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ يَعْنِي نَفْسَهُ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ عَلَى رِسْلِكَ يَا أَبَا بَكْرٍ سُدُّوا هَذِهِ الْأَبْوَابَ الشَّوَارِعَ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ إِلَّا بَابَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ فَإِنِّي لَا أَعْلَمُ امْرَأً أَفْضَلَ عِنْدِي يَدًا فِي الصُّحْبَةِ مِنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ
items.id: Has told us [Farwah bin Abu Al Maghra`] has told us [Ibrahim bin Mukhtar] from [Muhammad bin Ishaq] from [Muhammad bin Ka'ab] from ['Urwah] from ['Aisyah] Radliyallahu'anha he said: The Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said when he was sick: "Pour me seven buckets of water from seven different wells, so that I can come out to people to fulfill their promises" the narrator said: "So we sat him on a vessel belonging to Hafsah Radliyallahu'anha, we sprinkled or poured water on him - we sprinkled the editorial doubts or we poured this from Muhammad bin Ishaq -, then he found peace, then he came out and climbed the pulpit while saying: "The Ansar are my trusted people and the keepers of my secrets, where I take refuge, unless they really violate it; law. Remember, there is a servant of Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala who is given the freedom to choose between the world and what is with Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala, so he chooses what is with Allah Subhanahu wa Ta'ala." Then Abu Bakr Radliyallahu'anhu cried, he thought that the words of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam were addressed to him. Then the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Wait a minute, O Abu Bakr, close it the doors of the road leading to the mosque (Nabawi) except the door of Abu Bakr, because I do not know anyone who is more important to me in friendship and defense than Abu Bakr, Radliyallahu'anhu."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ حَدّ��ثَنَا فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْ أُوذِنَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِالصَّلَاةِ فِي مَرَضِهِ فَقَالَ مُرُوا أَبَا بَكْرٍ يُصَلِّي بِالنَّاسِ ثُمَّ أُغْمِيَ عَلَيْهِ فَلَمَّا سُرِّيَ عَنْهُ قَالَ هَلْ أَمَرْتُنَّ أَبَا بَكْرٍ يُصَلِّي بِالنَّاسِ فَقُلْتُ إِنَّ أَبَا بَكْرٍ رَجُلٌ رَقِيقٌ فَلَوْ أَمَرْتَ عُمَرَ فَقَالَ أَنْتُنَّ صَوَاحِبُ يُوسُفَ مُرُوا أَبَا بَكْرٍ يُصَلِّي بِالنَّاسِ فَرُبَّ قَائِلٍ مُتَمَنٍّ وَيَأْبَى اللَّهُ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ
items.id: Has told us [Sa'id bin Manshur] has told us [Fulaih bin Sulaiman] from [Sulaiman bin Abdurrahman] from [Al Qasim bin Muhammad] from ['Aisyah] Radliyallahu'anha he said: "Rasulullah sallallaahu 'Alaihi wa Aallam permitted the call to prayer to be called, then he said: "Order Abu Bakr to lead the prayer people", then he fell unconscious. When he regained consciousness, he asked: "Have I ordered Abu Bakr Radliyallahu'anhu to lead the people? Then I (the narrator) said: "Isn't Abu Bakr a gentle man who cries easily, shouldn't you just order Umar?" So Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "Ah, you are just like Yusuf's brothers, order Abu Bakr to lead the people, how many people dream but Allah Subhaanallahu wa Ta'ala and the believers do not want it."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الدِّمَشْقِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا شُعَيْبٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْحَقَ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ حَدَّثَنِي يَعِيشُ بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ حَدَّثَنِي مَكْحُولٌ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ إِذَا أَصَابَ أَحَدَكُمْ مُصِيبَةٌ فَلْيَذْكُرْ مُصِيبَتَهُ بِي فَإِنَّهَا مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْمَصَائِبِ
items.id: Has told us [Abdul Wahab bin Sa'id Ad Dimasyqi] has told us [Syu'aib Ibn Ishaq], has told us [Al 'Auza'i] has told me [Ya'isy bin Al Walid] has told me [Makhul] that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "If one of you suffers from a disaster, then imagine that the disaster that befell him befell me, then it would be greatest calamity."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا فِطْرٌ عَنْ عَطَاءٍ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِذَا أَصَابَ أَحَدَكُمْ مُصِيبَةٌ فَلْيَذْكُرْ مُصَابَهُ بِي فَإِنَّهَا مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْمَصَائِبِ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Nu'aim] has told us [Fithr] from ['Atha`] he said: Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam: "If a disaster befalls one of you then imagine that disaster befell me, then that would be one of the greatest disasters."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ أَنَّ فَاطِمَةَ قَالَتْ يَا أَنَسُ كَيْفَ طَابَتْ أَنْفُسُكُمْ أَنْ تَحْثُوا عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ التُّرَابَ وَقَالَتْ يَا أَبَتَاهْ مِنْ رَبِّهِ مَا أَدْنَاهْ وَا أَبَتَاهْ جَنَّةُ الْفِرْدَوْسِ مَأْوَاهْ وَا أَبَتَاهْ إِلَى جِبْرِيلَ نَنْعَاهْ وَا أَبَتَاهْ أَجَابَ رَبًّا دَعَاهْ قَالَ حَمَّادٌ حِينَ حَدَّثَ ثَابِتٌ بَكَى و قَالَ ثَابِتٌ حِينَ حَدَّثَ أَنَسٌ بَكَى
items.id: Has told us [Abu An Nu'man] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Tsabit] from [Anas bin Malik] Radliyallahu'anhu that [Fatimah] Radliyallahu'anha asked: "O Anas, how do you like to sprinkle earth on (the grave of) the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam? And Fatimah while chanting: "O my father who how close he is to his Rabb, O my father to whom Paradise is the place of return, O my father to whom Jibril 'Alaihissalam we announced his death, O my father to whom he fulfilled (his) Rabb when he called him". Hammad Rahimahullah said: "When Tsabit conveyed this hadith, he cried". Tsabit said: "Anas Radliyallahu'anhu when he conveyed this hadith he cried".

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ ثَابِتٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ وَذَكَرَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ شَهِدْتُهُ يَوْمَ دَخَلَ الْمَدِينَةَ فَمَا رَأَيْتُ يَوْمًا قَطُّ كَانَ أَحْسَنَ وَلَا أَضْوَأَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ دَخَلَ عَلَيْنَا فِيهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَشَهِدْتُهُ يَوْمَ مَوْتِهِ فَمَا رَأَيْتُ يَوْمًا كَانَ أَقْبَحَ وَلَا أَظْلَمَ مِنْ يَوْمٍ مَاتَ فِيهِ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us ['Affan] has told us [Hammad Salamah] from [Tsabit] from [Anas] Radliyallahu'anhu he recalled the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, "I witnessed him when he entered Medina, I never saw a better and brighter day than the day when the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam came to Medina, and I also witnessed the day of his death, so I did not see a day that was worse and worse. darker than the day the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam died."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مَالِكٍ النُّكْرِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْجَوْزَاءِ أَوْسُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ قُحِطَ أَهْلُ الْمَدِينَةِ قَحْطًا شَدِيدًا فَشَكَوْا إِلَى عَائِشَةَ فَقَالَتْ انْظُرُوا قَبْرَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَاجْعَلُوا مِنْهُ كِوًى إِلَى السَّمَاءِ حَتَّى لَا يَكُونَ بَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ سَقْفٌ قَالَ فَفَعَلُوا فَمُطِرْنَا مَطَرًا حَتَّى نَبَتَ الْعُشْبُ وَسَمِنَتْ الْإِبِلُ حَتَّى تَفَتَّقَتْ مِنْ الشَّحْمِ فَسُمِّيَ عَامَ الْفَتْقِ
items.id: Has told us [Abu Nu'man] has told us [Sa'id bin Zaid] has told us [Umar bin Malik An Nukri] has told us [Abu Al Jauza` Aus bin Abdullah], he said: "One day the people of Medina were hit by a very severe drought, and at that time they complained to [Aisyah] Radliyallahu'anha, then she said: "Go to the grave of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, make a hole towards the sky and don't let there be a roof between it and the sky. Then Abu Al Jauza` continued his story: "Then the people of Medina did what Aisyah Radliyallahu'anha ordered, after that, the rain fell and the grass grew and the livestock became healthy. Therefore that year was called the year of victory."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مَرْوَانُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ قَالَ لَمَّا كَانَ أَيَّامُ الْحَرَّةِ لَمْ يُؤَذَّنْ فِي مَسْجِدِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثَلَاثًا وَلَمْ يُقَمْ وَلَمْ يَبْرَحْ سَعِيدُ بْنُ الْمُسَيَّبِ مِنْ الْمَسْجِدِ وَكَانَ لَا يَعْرِفُ وَقْتَ الصَّلَاةِ إِلَّا بِهَمْهَمَةٍ يَسْمَعُهَا مِنْ قَبْرِ النَّبِيِّ فَذَكَرَ مَعْنَاهُ
items.id: It was reported to us by [Marwan bin Muhammad] from [Sa'id bin Abdul Aziz] that he said: "When there was a terrible dry season, there was no call to prayer in the Nabawi mosque three times, nor did Iqamah. And, [Sa'id bin Al Musayyib] did not come out of the mosque of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. He did not know the time of prayer except after hearing voices from the direction of the grave of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. Then he stated its meaning.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ صَالِحٍ حَدَّثَنِي اللَّيْثُ حَدَّثَنِي خَالِدٌ هُوَ ابْنُ يَزِيدَ عَنْ سَعِيدٍ هُوَ ابْنُ أَبِي هِلَالٍ عَنْ نُبَيْهِ بْنِ وَهْبٍ أَنَّ كَعْبًا دَخَلَ عَلَى عَائِشَةَ فَذَكَرُوا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ كَعْبٌ مَا مِنْ يَوْمٍ يَطْلُعُ إِلَّا نَزَلَ سَبْعُونَ أَلْفًا مِنْ الْمَلَائِكَةِ حَتَّى يَحُفُّوا بِقَبْرِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَضْرِبُونَ بِأَجْنِحَتِهِمْ وَيُصَلُّونَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ حَتَّى إِذَا أَمْسَوْا عَرَجُوا وَهَبَطَ مِثْلُهُمْ فَصَنَعُوا مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ حَتَّى إِذَا انْشَقَّتْ عَنْهُ الْأَرْضُ خَرَجَ فِي سَبْعِينَ أَلْفًا مِنْ الْمَلَائِكَةِ يَزِفُّونَهُ
items.id: It has been told to us [Abdullah bin Salih] has told me, [Al Laits] has told me, [Khalid Ibnu Yazid], from [Sa`id Ibnu Abu Hilal] from [Nubaih bin Wahb] that Ka'ab came to visit Aisyah Radliyallahu'anha. Then the companions mentioned the name of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, [Ka'ab] said: "Not a single day (passes) unless a thousand angels descend and surround the grave of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, they flap their wings and offer blessings to the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam. Until evening comes, they ascend (to the sky,) and the angels descend like the same and do the same as before, until the earth is split open, He sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam came out accompanied by seventy thousand angels."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ أَخْبَرَنَا ثَوْرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ حَدَّثَنِي خَالِدُ بْنُ مَعْدَانَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ عِرْبَاضِ بْنِ سَارِيَةَ قَالَ صَلَّى لَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ صَلَاةَ الْفَجْرِ ثُمَّ وَعَظَنَا مَوْعِظَةً بَلِيغَةً ذَرَفَتْ مِنْهَا الْعُيُونُ وَوَجِلَتْ مِنْهَا الْقُلُوبُ فَقَالَ قَائِلٌ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ كَأَنَّهَا مَوْعِظَةُ مُوَدِّعٍ فَأَوْصِنَا فَقَالَ أُوصِيكُمْ بِتَقْوَى اللَّهِ وَالسَّمْعِ وَالطَّاعَةِ وَإِنْ كَانَ عَبْدًا حَبَشِيًّا فَإِنَّهُ مَنْ يَعِشْ مِنْكُمْ بَعْدِي فَسَيَرَى اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا فَعَلَيْكُمْ بِسُنَّتِي وَسَنَّةِ الْخُلَفَاءِ الرَّاشِدِينَ الْمَهْدِيِّينَ عَضُّوا عَلَيْهَا بِالنَّوَاجِذِ وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَالْمُحْدَثَاتِ فَإِنَّ كُلَّ مُحْدَثَةٍ بِدْعَةٌ و قَالَ أَبُو عَاصِمٍ مَرَّةً وَإِيَّاكُمْ وَمُحْدَثَاتِ الْأُمُورِ فَإِنَّ كُلَّ بِدْعَةٍ ضَلَالَةٌ
items.id: Has told us [Abu 'Ashim] has told us [Tsaur bin Yazid] has told me [Khalid bin Ma'dan] from [Abdur Rahman bin 'Amr] from ['Irbadl bin Sariah] he said; "The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allaah be upon him) prayed the morning prayer with us, then he gave us advice with very deep advice until (our) tears flowed and (we) trembled carefully, then someone asked; "O Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, as if this advice was the final advice (that you gave), then give us a testament. Then He said: "I command you to fear Allah Subhaanallahu wa Ta'ala and always listen and obey (to the leaders), even though he is a slave of Habasyah, in fact whoever of you who lives after me will surely see many differences, then you must follow my sunnah and the straight Sunnah of the khulafa`urrasyidin, bite it with your molars (hold it firmly), be careful with everything new (things) bid`ah), because anything new is bid`ah." Abu 'Ashim said: "You should be careful of new things (in religion), because every innovation is heresy."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ عَنْ يُونُسَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ قَالَ كَانَ مَنْ مَضَى مِنْ عُلَمَائِنَا يَقُولُونَ الِاعْتِصَامُ بِالسُّنَّةِ نَجَاةٌ وَالْعِلْمُ يُقْبَضُ قَبْضًا سَرِيعًا فَنَعْشُ الْعِلْمِ ثَبَاتُ الدِّينِ وَالدُّنْيَا وَفِي ذَهَابِ الْعِلْمِ ذَهَابُ ذَلِكَ كُلِّهِ
items.id: It has been reported to us that [Abu Al Mughirah] has told us [Al `Auza'i] from [Yunus bin Yazid] from [Az Zuhri] he said: "Not one of our scholars has missed anything but they say: 'Adhering to the Sunnah is success, and knowledge will be revoked quickly, upholding that knowledge is an upholding of religion and the world, and with the loss of knowledge all that is lost."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ أَبِي عَمْرٍو السَّيْبَانِيِّ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الدَّيْلَمِيِّ قَالَ بَلَغَنِي أَنَّ أَوَّلَ الدِّينِ تَرْكًا السُّنَّةُ يَذْهَبُ الدِّينُ سُنَّةً سُنَّةً كَمَا يَذْهَبُ الْحَبْلُ قُوَّةً قُوَّةً
items.id: It has been reported to us [Abu Al Mughirah] has told us [Al `Auza'i] from [Yahya bin Abu 'Amr As Saibani] from [Abdullah bin Ad Dailami] he said: "(News) has come to me that the first of the problems of religion to be abandoned is the sunnah, this religion will lose its sunnah one by one as a thread is cut little by little."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْمُغِيرَةِ حَدَّثَنَا الْأَوْزَاعِيُّ عَنْ حَسَّانَ قَالَ مَا ابْتَدَعَ قَوْمٌ بِدْعَةً فِي دِينِهِمْ إِلَّا نَزَعَ اللَّهُ مِنْ سُنَّتِهِمْ مِثْلَهَا ثُمَّ لَا يُعِيدُهَا إِلَيْهِمْ إِلَى يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Abu Al Mughirah] has told us [Al `Auza'i] from [Hassan] he said: "It is not a people who makes a bid`ah in their religion but Allah Subhaanallahu wa Ta'ala will remove from their sunnah such a part of the bid`ah (which they committed) then He will not return the sunnah again until the Day of Resurrection."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَدَّثَنَا وُهَيْبٌ حَدَّثَنَا أَيُّوبُ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ قَالَ مَا ابْتَدَعَ رَجُلٌ بِدْعَةً إِلَّا اسْتَحَلَّ السَّيْفَ
items.id: Has told us [Muslim bin Ibrahim] has told us [Wuhaib] has told us [Ayyub] from [Abu Kilabah] he said: "No one commits heresy unless he permits the sword to be cut."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ عَنْ أَبِي قِلَابَةَ قَالَ إِنَّ أَهْلَ الْأَهْوَاءِ أَهْلُ الضَّلَالَةِ وَلَا أَرَى مَصِيرَهُمْ إِلَّا النَّارَ فَجَرِّبْهُمْ فَلَيْسَ أَحَدٌ مِنْهُمْ يَنْتَحِلُ قَوْلًا أَوْ قَالَ حَدِيثًا فَيَتَنَاهَى بِهِ الْأَمْرُ دُونَ السَّيْفِ وَإِنَّ النِّفَاقَ كَانَ ضُرُوبًا ثُمَّ تَلَا { وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ عَاهَدَ اللَّهَ } { وَمِنْهُمْ مَنْ يَلْمِزُكَ فِي الصَّدَقَاتِ } { وَمِنْهُمْ الَّذِينَ يُؤْذُونَ النَّبِيَّ } فَاخْتَلَفَ قَوْلُهُمْ وَاجْتَمَعُوا فِي الشَّكِّ وَالتَّكْذِيبِ وَإِنَّ هَؤُلَاءِ اخْتَلَفَ قَوْلُهُمْ وَاجْتَمَعُوا فِي السَّيْفِ وَلَا أَرَى مَصِيرَهُمْ إِلَّا النَّارَ قَالَ حَمَّادٌ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَيُّوبُ عِنْدَ ذَا الْحَدِيثِ أَوْ عِنْدَ الْأَوَّلِ وَكَانَ وَاللَّهِ مِنْ الْفُقَهَاءِ ذَوِي الْأَلْبَابِ يَعْنِي أَبَا قِلَابَةَ
items.id: Has told us [Sulaiman bin Harb] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Ayyub] from [Abu Qilabah] he said: "Indeed the worshipers of lust are people who are astray, and I do not see the end of their journey except hell. Put them to the test. There is not one of them who cites words or says, until the problem is nothing but the sword. Indeed, hypocrisy has become their characteristic. Then he read the verse "WA MINHUM MAN 'AHADALLAHA' (And among them there are people who have made a vow to Allah Subhaanallahu wa Ta'ala) -Qs. At Taubah: 75-, and the verse "WA MINHUM MAN YALMIZUKA FIS SHADAQAAT' (And among them there are people who criticize you about (distribution of) zakat) -Qs. At Taubah: 58-, and the verse "WAMINHUMULLADZINA YU`DZUUNANABIYYA' (And among them 'hypocrites' there are those who hurt the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam) -Qs. Attaubah: 116-,. Then they differed and disagreed, and finally they gathered together in doubt and lies. In fact, they differ in opinion and are united in the clash of swords. And I did not see their journey except to hell". Hammad said: "Ayyub said about this hadith or early hadith, by Allah Subhaanallahu wa Ta'ala, he is one of the most intelligent experts in jurisprudence, I mean Abu Qilabah."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا الْمَسْعُودِيُّ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ عَنْ النَّزَّالِ بْنِ سَبْرَةَ قَالَ مَا خَطَبَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ خُطْبَةً بِالْكُوفَةِ إِلَّا شَهِدْتُهَا فَسَمِعْتُهُ يَوْمًا وَسُئِلَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ يُطَلِّقُ امْرَأَتَهُ ثَمَانِيَةً وَأَشْبَاهِ ذَلِكَ قَالَ هُوَ كَمَا قَالَ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَنْزَلَ كِتَابَهُ وَبَيَّنَ بَيَانَهُ فَمَنْ أَتَى الْأَمْرَ مِنْ قِبَلِ وَجْهِهِ فَقَدْ بُيِّنَ لَهُ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ فَوَاللَّهِ مَا نُطِيقُ خِلَافَكُمْ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Abu Nu'aim] has told us [Al Mas'udi] from [Abdul Malik bin Maisarah] from [An Nazzal bin Sabrah] he said: It was not [Abdullah] who delivered a single sermon in the city of Kufa unless I attended it. One day I once heard (he preached) and he was asked about someone who menthalaq (divorced) his wife eight times or something like that, so he answered: "What he said has fallen", then he said: "Allah has sent down His book and explained it, whoever does something according to what (comes) from Him, indeed it has been explained to him, but whoever violates it, by Allah we are unable to accept your wrong actions."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ أَخْبَرَنِي عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مَيْسَرَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ النَّزَّالَ بْنَ سَبْرَةَ قَالَ شَهِدْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ وَأَتَاهُ رَجُلٌ وَامْرَأَةٌ فِي تَحْرِيمٍ فَقَالَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ قَدْ بَيَّنَ فَمَنْ أَتَى الْأَمْرَ مِنْ قِبَلِ وَجْهِهِ فَقَدْ بُيِّنَ وَمَنْ خَالَفَ فَوَاللَّهِ مَا نُطِيقُ خِلَافَكُمْ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Abu Al Walid Ath Thayalitsi] has told us [Syu'bah] he said: has informed me [Abdul Malik bin Maisarah] he said: I heard [An Nazzal bin Sabrah] say: I once witnessed [Abdullah] when a man and a woman came to him (to ask) about the prohibition of their relationship, then he answered: "Allah has sent down His book, whoever does something in accordance with it. His law, indeed it has been made clear to him, but whoever violates it, by Allah we cannot bear the burden of your deviation."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصٌ عَنْ أَشْعَثَ عَنْ ابْنِ سِيرِينَ أَنَّهُ كَانَ لَا يَقُولُ بِرَأْيِهِ إِلَّا شَيْئًا سَمِعَهُ
items.id: It has been reported to us that [Abdullah bin Sa'id] has told us [Hafsh] from [`Ash'ats] from [Ibn Sirin]: "That he never said his opinion except something he had heard."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو النُّعْمَانِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ مَا قُلْتُ بِرَأْيِي مُنْذُ ثَلَاثُونَ سَنَةً قَالَ أَبُو هِلَالٍ مُنْذُ أَرْبَعِينَ سَنَةً
items.id: Has told us [Abu An Nu'man] has told us [Abu 'Awanah] from [Qatadah] he said: "I have never expressed my opinion alone since thirty years ago. [Abu Hilal] said: "Even since forty years."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مَخْلَدُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَكَّامُ بْنُ سَلْمٍ عَنْ أَبِي خَيْثَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ رُفَيْعٍ قَالَ سُئِلَ عَطَاءٌ عَنْ شَيْءٍ قَالَ لَا أَدْرِي قَالَ قِيلَ لَهُ أَلَا تَقُولُ فِيهَا بِرَأْيِكَ قَالَ إِنِّي أَسْتَحْيِي مِنْ اللَّهِ أَنْ يُدَانَ فِي الْأَرْضِ بِرَأْيِي
items.id: Has told us [Makhlad bin Malik] has told us [Hakkam bin Salm] from [Abu Khaitsamah] from [Abdul Aziz bin Rufai'] he said: ['Atho`] was asked about something, then he answered: 'I don't know' then someone said: 'why don't you answer that with your opinion (only)? ', he replied: 'I am ashamed of Allah for making my opinion the guide on earth'.".

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا إِسْمَعِيلُ بْنُ أَبَانَ حَدَّثَنَا حَاتِمٌ هُوَ ابْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ عَنْ عِيسَى عَنْ الشَّعْبِيِّ قَالَ إِيَّاكُمْ وَالْمُقَايَسَةَ وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَئِنْ أَخَذْتُمْ بِالْمُقَايَسَةِ لَتُحِلُّنَّ الْحَرَامَ وَلَتُحَرِّمُنَّ الْحَلَالَ وَلَكِنْ مَا بَلَغَكُمْ عَنْ مَنْ حَفِظَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَاعْمَلُوا بِهِ
items.id: Has told us [Ismail bin Abaan] has told us [Hatim] from [Isa] from [As Sya'bi] he said: "Be careful when you do qiyas by relying solely on your brain (ratio), for the sake of the One in Whose Hands my soul is, if you do it then you will make lawful what is haram and forbid what is halal, but the news that has come to you is from the clever companions of Muhammad sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam religion, do it."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَوْنٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِيرِينَ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ قَالَ جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى عَبْدِ اللَّهِ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ الْبَارِحَةَ ثَمَانِيًا قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ فَيُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُبِينُوا مِنْكَ امْرَأَتَكَ قَالَ نَعَمْ قَالَ وَجَاءَهُ رَجُلٌ فَقَالَ إِنَّهُ طَلَّقَ امْرَأَتَهُ مِائَةَ طَلْقَةٍ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ بِكَلَامٍ وَاحِدٍ قَالَ فَيُرِيدُونَ أَنْ يُبِينُوا مِنْكَ امْرَأَتَكَ قَالَ نَعَمْ فَقَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ مَنْ طَلَّقَ كَمَا أَمَرَهُ اللَّهُ فَقَدْ بَيَّنَ اللَّهُ الطَّلَاقَ وَمَنْ لَبَّسَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ وَكَّلْنَا بِهِ لَبْسَهُ وَاللَّهِ لَا تُلَبِّسُونَ عَلَى أَنْفُسِكُمْ وَنَتَحَمَّلُهُ نَحْنُ هُوَ كَمَا تَقُولُونَ
items.id: Has reported to us [Sa'id bin 'Amir] from [Ibn 'Aun] from [Muhammad bin Sirin] from [Alqamah] he said: Someone met Abdullah, he conveyed his complaints that he had divorced his wife eight times last night. He (Abdullah) asked: 'with one word? ', the person answered: 'with one word'. Abdullah asked: Then they want you (menthalaq) to ba`in your wife'?, he answered: 'Yes, that's right'. Then ('Alqamah) narrated again: "And someone once visited Abdullah and told him that he had divorced his wife a hundred times'. Abdullah asked: 'with one word? ', he answered: 'yes, with one word'. Then Abdullah asked: 'then they want you (menthalaq) to ba`in your wife? ', he answered: 'yes, that's right'. So [Abdullah] said: "Whoever menthalaq (his wife) according to the way that Allah has prescribed explain, indeed Allah has explained thalaq. On the other hand, whoever commits a rash act on himself (a reckless act that has no explanation), we leave his recklessness or rashness to him, for the sake of Allah, "Don't ever act rashly on yourselves, so that we feel exhausted like the complaints you convey to me."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ حَرْبٍ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ لَأَنْ يَعِيشَ الرَّجُلُ جَاهِلًا بَعْدَ أَنْ يَعْلَمَ حَقَّ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ خَيْرٌ لَهُ مِنْ أَنْ يَقُولَ مَا لَا يَعْلَمُ
items.id: It has been reported to us [Sulaiman bin Harb] has told us [Hammad bin Zaid] from [Yahya bin Sa'id] from [Al Qasim] he said: "A person lives in ignorance after he knows Allah's right to him, it is better for him than saying what he does not know."
